title: wedelia chinensis
intro: Wedelia chinensis, also known as Butterfly Weed, is a flowering plant native to Asia, belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). It is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and terpenoids. The health benefits of Wedelia chinensis include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and exhibit antioxidant and anti-cancer properties. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal use, and its flowers can be consumed as a food source or used as a natural dye.
